title: Biome Creepers for Fresh Animations
description: A "Fresh Animations" compatibility patch for the "Nitpicks - Biome Creepers" resource pack.
body:
## A [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) compatibility patch for the [Nitpicks - Biome Creepers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/biome-creepers) resource pack.
![Some of the Creepers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52210b85758f604f534d2c49fa909a6114374ed3.png)
### Requires Fresh Animations and Biome Creepers resource packs in this loading order
![Loading Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19878da60eb8352f269e1ac77cdb0318d6ebde06.png)

### Credits
- Fresh Animations (By FreshLX)
  - Changes to the Creeper model to accomodate new UV and new model parts.
